create_file_cache: create a FileStateCache instance to track files read and written during a session
mark_read_file: mark a file as read by calling mark_read with its path and optional content
mark_written_file: mark a file as written by calling mark_written with its path to invalidate the read cache
check_file_freshness: check if a cached file is unchanged since last read by calling is_fresh with its path
get_session_summary: get a session file activity summary with files read and written counts using get_summary
